provable_floors.description: 2nd-order Markov oracle: P(s_n | s_{n-1}, s_{n-2}). Context table overhead omitted.
provable_floors.name: markov2_per_tensor

provable_floors.description: 1st-order Markov oracle: P(s_n | s_{n-1}). Context table overhead omitted.
provable_floors.name: markov1_per_tensor

provable_floors.description: Each tensor encoded against its own empirical PMF. Provable per-tensor-marginal floor.
provable_floors.name: iid_per_tensor

provable_floors.description: Same as iid_per_tensor; tensor index treated as side-info.
provable_floors.name: conditional_on_tensor

provable_floors.description: All symbols treated as iid from a single pooled empirical PMF. Provable iid-pooled floor.
provable_floors.name: iid_joint_pooled

shannon_source_coding_theorem_statement: For a declared source model, no uniquely-decodable prefix code can beat that model's entropy in expectation; arithmetic or range coders can approach the model code length closely. These rows are model-class floors, not a proof of the unrestricted global optimum over all possible compressors.
